mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (department_id, name, employee_number, title, role, email, password) VALUES (#{departmentId}, #{name}, #{employeeNumber}, #{title}, #{role}, #{email}, #{password})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET department_id = #{departmentId}, name = #{name}, title = #{title}, role = #{role}, email = #{email}, password = #{password} WHERE id = #{id}
